texto: It gets harder as times go by, because memory is the first casualty of manic depression. When I'm manic, all I remember is the moment. When I'm depressed, all I remember is the pain. The surrounding details are lost to me.
explicacao: Citação de Terry Cheney sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “It gets harder as times go by, because memory is the first casualty of manic depression. When I'm…” articula tempo, depression, reflexao em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
